phase_name: Phase 3 kickoff: cable physics + object TF + per-object PARITY

completed_tasks.name: Bug 4 root caused as 8 layered bugs (was diagnosed as 1 by prior verifier)
Phase 2 closed at 6/7 smoke (Step 3 carry-forward); Phase 1 13/13 maintained
Autonomous M1 mode infrastructure: hooks + scripts + CLAUDE.md bootstrap + marker

remaining_tasks.name: /gsd-discuss-phase 3 --auto — Cable Physics SCENE-05 + Object TF SCENE-06 + PARITY-07/08. Per CLAUDE.md SCENE-05 guidance: in-place USD edit (D-06 policy) per NVIDIA RigidBodyRopeDemo.py template (~3-4 hr) — NOT research-gated.
Phase 4: trial loader + end-to-end M1 verification under live aic_engine + CheatCode (against Isaac Sim on ROS_DOMAIN_ID=7)
M1 deliverable: every sample_config.yaml trial passes under CheatCode against Isaac Sim. touch .planning/.m1_shipped to disable autonomous mode.

decisions.decision: Phase 2 closed at 6/7 smoke with Step 3 carry-forward documented. Mirrors Phase 1's 9/10 close pattern.
decisions.rationale: Real aic_controller pre-smooths trajectories; per-cmd deltas << 0.05 rad; PD tracking is tight in real operation. Single-shot 0.05-rad smoke step hits a transient PD-damping regime that doesn't reflect real operation.

decisions.decision: ROS_DOMAIN_ID=7 is the canonical Isaac Sim domain (separate from default 0 which has the user's live UR5e robot driver). Documented in CLAUDE.md.
decisions.rationale: Discovered 2026-05-05: live UR robot driver's joint_state_broadcaster on domain 0 was racing parity_publishers on /joint_states. Domain isolation eliminates the conflict without disturbing the real robot.

decisions.decision: Articulation handles must be lazily constructed in physics tick (≥30 ticks after play) — NEVER at extension start time. _physics_view isn't populated until after first physics step.
decisions.rationale: Verified 2026-05-05 across controller_loop AND parity_publishers. start-time construction returns a handle whose every method raises AttributeError. Same pattern needed for any future Articulation use in this repo.

decisions.decision: ArticulationKinematicsSolver requires SingleArticulation (legacy class with .handles_initialized), not the new isaacsim.core.prims.Articulation.
decisions.rationale: compute_end_effector_pose raises AttributeError without SingleArticulation. Construct two handles: SingleArticulation for kinematics, Articulation for set/get/apply.

decisions.decision: Phase 3 SCENE-05 = mechanical USD mass/inertia edit per NVIDIA RigidBodyRopeDemo.py template, NOT research-gated.
decisions.rationale: Per CLAUDE.md: empirical re-test 2026-05-03 disproved D-04 (cable wedge no longer reproduces under current launch path). Solution: author proper mass/inertia per rope-demo template (~3-4 hr).

next_action: Invoke /gsd-discuss-phase 3 --auto to gather Phase 3 context (cable physics + object TF). Per autonomous mode, do not pause. After discuss, /gsd-plan-phase 3, then /gsd-execute-phase 3, then close. Then Phase 4. Then M1.
context_notes: Phase 2 took 8 layered bugs to fix Bug 4. Phase 3 should be cleaner — the cable physics work is well-scoped (per CLAUDE.md SCENE-05 guidance), object TF (SCENE-06) mirrors Phase 1's TF publish surface, PARITY-07/08 are publisher additions. Estimated 3-4hr for SCENE-05 + 1-2hr for SCENE-06 + 1-2hr for PARITY-07/08 + 30min closure = ~6-8hr Phase 3 total. Phase 4 trial loader is the M1 ship gate — should be ~4-6hr if Phase 3 is clean.
